choices: Maggie and Bart have Ralph put Lisa's left over pulls ups on
Maggie personally puts one of her huggies on Ralph
Maggie and Bart tried to save Ralph from embarrassement in front of the others
1.content:
It all started in the middle of the night. When Maggie goes looking for Bart after having a bad nightmare. She looks all over the house, and then it hits her. She immediately remembers that he's hosting a sleepover in his treehouse. So Maggie makes her way to the treehouse.

Once inside the treehouse as she walks over Ralph. The floor around him is wet, and so she tries to find Bart and wake him up. Bart says. "Maggie why are you up, how did you get up here, and why are your feet wet." Maggie answers back saying. "I had a nightmare and came looking for you." "So I knew that you were having this sleepover in the treehouse, and I climbed up and into the treehouse."

Bart says. "Maggie you can stay with me tonight, and you'll be the second exception to the no girls allowed rule because we both know that mom is automatically the first exception." Maggie then says. "O thank you Bart, and I think Ralph either spilled his drink or wet himself." Bart then says. "How are you sure Maggie?" All Maggie says is. "Bart just come with me, and I'll prove that Ralph made the floor wet."

So Maggie quickly makes Bart check her diaper. Once Bart checks her diaper and finds it dry, and her onesie dry execpt where her feet are. So Bart follows Maggie over to where Ralph is sleeping. Bart says to Maggie once they get there. "Um Maggie I think you're right about Ralph wetting himself, because we all finished our drinks before we went to sleep." Maggie says. "Hey Bart going to check to see if his pajama bottoms are wet."

So Maggie goes and checks Ralph's pajama bottoms. She then motions for Bart to help her wake Ralph up. So with Bart's help Maggie wakes Ralph up, and they quickly and quietly get him up to Maggie's room before anyone else finds out about Ralph's bed wetting problem. Ralph says. "Where are you two taking me?"

Maggie quickly whispers. "Sh Ralph! We're taking you to my room Ralph, and if you don't want Nelson to find out that you wet yourself Ralph. Then you must keep quiet, in fact here this will keep you quiet." When all of a sudden before Ralph could say another word. Maggie had already put her pacifier in his mouth.

So once up in Maggie's room they have Ralph take his wet clothes off. Ralph says. "I'm not taking my underwear off in front of your baby sister Bart." Maggie speaks up and says. "Ralph the quicker you take them off, the quicker I can put one of Lisa's left over pulls up from when she was being potty trained." Ralph then says. "Maggie I'm not wearing girl pull ups."

Maggie then says. "Ralph you have three choices to pick from, but I'm going to warn you now that your best and probably less embarrassing choice. Is to just wear Lisa's left over pulls ups." Ralph then asks Maggie. "What are my other two choices?" Maggie says. "Well one of the other two choices is that me and Bart put one of my huggies on you."

Maggie then says. "The last choice is that me and Bart have you put your wet clothes back on, and then we all go back into the treehouse." Ralph says. "Is that all you're going to do if I pick the last choice." Maggie then says. "Nope because once we're all back in the treehouse, me and Bart are going to wake everyone else up." What do you want to see happen to Ralph?
1.title: Maggie's bad nightmare and Ralph wets himself

choices: Yes
No
11.content:
Maggie says. "We know that you don't really want to wear a pull up especially ones for girls, but Ralph look at it this way at least nobody will see you with wet clothes and pull ups aren't as noticeable as diapers are." So with the reassurance from Maggie that the only people who know about Ralph wearing a pull up, is just Ralph himself, Maggie, and Bart. Ralph then says. "Ok I'll wear the pull up but what about my pajamas."

So as they help Ralph get the pull up on. Maggie says. "Hey Ralph maybe you should sit on this while Bart goes and gets you some pajamas to wear over the pull up." Bart and Ralph are both shocked, when they see Maggie taking Lisa's old potty out of the closet.

Bart says. "Maggie we only came up here to get Ralph new pajamas and something to wear underneath them to make sure it doesn't happen again." Maggie then says. "Well do you two want to risk waking up, Homer, mom, or Lisa by letting Ralph use the toilet." Bart then says. "Wow Maggie I guess I didn't think ahead that far to see what might happen if Ralph needed to use the bathroom."

Meanwhile as Ralph agrees to sit on the potty and at least try to go potty. Maggie leaves her room to check on the others to make sure that they're still sleeping. Bart on the other hand goes to his room to grab Ralph some pajamas to wear. So when Maggie and Bart return to Maggie's room. Ralph immediately walks over to them and says. " look it went potty on the potty just like a big boy."

Maggie then says. "Ralph put the pajamas on and both of you go back to the treehouse and I'll join you two after I take care of emptying the potty." So Ralph puts the pajamas on before him and Bart leave Maggie's room and head back to the treehouse. So after Bart and Ralph are gone. Maggie takes her huggies off and sits on the potty and tries to go potty before she empties it into the toilet.

So after a few minutes Lisa gets up to use the bathroom and notices that Maggie's bedroom light is on. So she decides to check up on Maggie and when she does she in shock. Lisa says once Maggie's door is open. "Hey Maggie did you wake up to go potty all by yourself." This startled Maggie and so Maggie knowing that she can't tell Lisa the truth, and is now forced to just agree with her big sister. So Maggie answers back saying. "Yes I did wake up to go potty Lisa, and also because I had a terrible nightmare where I was never potty trained and had to live my whole life in huggies."

So Lisa then says as she notices that Maggie is almost done going potty. "Hey Maggie I can empty the potty for you since I woke up to use the bathroom, and you can either sleep with me or sleep with Bart. Maggie then tells Lisa as she puts on a pull up. "I'm going to sleep with Bart, but thanks for taking care of emptying the potty for me." So with that said Lisa and Maggie both walk into the bathroom. Once in the bathroom lisa quickly helps Maggie wash her hands and then hugs Maggie. Maggie says her goodnight to Lisa before going back to the treehouse. Does Bart ask Maggie what took her so long?
11.title: Maggie and Bart have Ralph put Lisa's left ...

choices: I lied to her
I told her the truth but only why I was up
Just said I had a nightmare and it woke me up and once up I needed to go potty
111.content: Bart says as he hears Maggie climbing into the treehouse. "Maggie! What took you so long to return to the treehouse?" Maggie says. "Lisa got up to use the toilet and saw my light, and so she went into big sister mode." Bart says. "Did you lie to her or tell the truth?" What's Maggie's answer?
111.title: Yes

choices: Ralph
Maggie
12.content:
Maggie says. "We know that you don't really want to wear my huggies, but Ralph look at it this way at least nobody will see you with wet clothes." Ralph then says. "Are you two sure that nobody will notice the diaper." Hmmm Maggie said. "Well it's not fool proof Ralph, but at least for now we're the only ones who know about your bed wetting problem and that the fact you're currently wearing a diaper."

So Maggie puts the huggies on Ralph, and once the huggies are on Ralph. Maggie, Bart, and Ralph all agree that it never happened, and they then leave Maggie's room and go back to the treehouse. So in the morning Maggie is the first one up and so she immediately wakes up Bart and Ralph. So that they can go to her room and get Ralph back in his own clothes that Maggie secretly washed and dried. Once Ralph is back in his own clothes. He then thanks Maggie and Bart, and they all return to the treehouse.

So a few weeks later Marge brings up that Maggie has recently been following everyone into the bathroom whenever they have to use the toilet. Marge then suggests that they start potty training Maggie, and so she sends Homer, Bart, Maggie, and Lisa to the store to buy Maggie her own potty and either huggies learning design pull ups, Pampers easy ups, or Pampers feel n learn. Once at the store they run into police chief Wiggum and Ralph, and so Bart and Maggie ask if they can look at toys with Ralph.

So Homer and chief Wiggum say yes, and so before Lisa could even ask why Bart and Maggie are going to the toy section with Ralph. Ralph, Bart, Maggie had already ran off towards the toy section. Meanwhile as Bart, Maggie, and Ralph are in the toy section. Chief Wiggum asks Lisa and Homer why they're looking at the potty training section.

Lisa speaks up saying. "Marge finally decided that it's time to potty train Maggie." Chief Wiggum then says embarrassingly. "Well I hope you have better luck with Maggie than we did with Ralph." Homer then asks chief Wiggum. "What do you mean better luck with Maggie?" Chief Wiggum then says as he grabs some learning design and some feel n learn training pants for Ralph.

"Well what I meant is that Ralph isn't fully potty trained yet, and we thought that he had stopped wetting the bed." He then goes on to say. "So after his last sleepover at you house, Ralph first started wetting his bed again and then the potty accidents started." He then says. "So now we're trying really hard to finally get Ralph potty trained."

When all of a sudden Ralph returns with a toy, and says as he starts crying. "Daddy that was supposed to be a secret, and then he admits that he had wet himself at the sleepover." He then says. "Maggie and Bart helped me out by giving me a dry pair of pajamas and then Maggie put huggies on me." Chief Wiggum then asks Ralph why the huggies. "Maggie just wanted me to wear them just in case I had another potty accident, Bart's pajamas wouldn't get dirty or wet."

So a few minutes later Bart returns on a skateboard without Maggie, and Lisa starts saying. "Where's Maggie Bart and how irresponsible he is letting his baby sister get lost in the store." Bart then tries to defend himself by saying. "As soon as Ralph found his toy, I noticed Maggie doing the pee pee dance and so I told Ralph that I have to take run Maggie to the restroom." Lisa says. "Well that explains why it took you longer to get back here, but that doesn't explain how you lost Maggie." Bart then says. "Ok Lisa I think I know how I lost her in the store." He then says. "I forgot my skateboard and since the restroom was right by the skateboard section. So I grabbed one and when I turned around to pick her up she was missing and so was the last skateboard."

When all of a sudden they're all shocked when Maggie comes out of nowhere skateboarding on the last skateboard in stock. Bart says. "Ay caramba look at Maggie ride that skateboard." Bart then says. "Maggie you scared all of us when you didn't come back with me." Maggie then says. "I'm sorry for scaring you guys." What happens next with Maggie's potty training and Ralph's continuation of his potty training? Who do you want to follow?
12.title: Maggie personally puts one of her huggies on Ralph

choices: Pee, no because he doesn't have enough time to ask before Maggie is done
Poop, yes because he has enough time to ask before Maggie is done
Pee and poop, no Bart just leaves that question for Homer and Marge to ask
122.content:
Later that day Bart and Maggie are skateboarding down to the sandbox at the local park. When all of a sudden Maggie says as they're almost in front of the police office. "Stop Bart! I need to go potty!" So they stop at the police station and go inside. Once inside Bart and Maggie walk up to chief Wiggum. Maggie then asks very cutely. "Chief Wiggum I can use your restroom please." Chief Wiggum then says. "Yes Maggie you can use the restroom. It's right around the corner, and me and Bart will be right outside the restroom if you need help."

So with that said Maggie ran into the restroom. She then notices a potty chair in the corner, and so she then check out the potty chair. Hmm that's strange she said to herself, as she reads the writing on the bottom of the potty chair. It reads this potty belongs to Ralph Wiggum. She then puts it back in the corner.

She then finds a step stool and potty trainer insert for the toilet, and once again Ralph's name is on it. So she carries the potty trainer insert to the toilet and puts it over the toilet seat. She then goes and moves the step stool in front the toilet. So once the toilet is ready for her to go potty in it. She then quickly lower her shorts and pull up down right before she sits down on the toilet.

What did Maggie immediately start going in the toilet? Does Bart ask chief Wiggum how things are going with potty training Ralph?
122.title: Maggie

Bart says that Maggie can ride with you
1221.content: Chief Wiggum asks Bart how's Maggie doing with learning how to use the potty. Bart says. "She just like my sister Lisa you show how to use it once and she never fails." When all of a sudden Maggie walks out of the restroom. Maggie says. "I'm all done Bart! Now lets skateboard to the park." Chief Wiggum and Bart both say. "Wow Maggie that was quick!" Maggie then says. "Well that's because I only had to pee." Chief Wiggum says. "I can drive you two down to the park." Does Maggie and Bart accept the offer or politely decline the offer or does Bart say that Maggie can ride with you?

1222.content:
Chief Wiggum asks Bart how's Maggie doing with learning how to use the potty. Bart says. "She just like my sister Lisa you show how to use it once and she never fails." Bart ask chief Wiggum how the potty training is going for Ralph. Chief Wiggum tells Bart. "It's hit or miss with Ralph." Chief then mentions. "I even have his training potty and step stool in the restroom."

Bart says. "Hey Maggie can you chief Wiggum what big girl you are. Maggie answers back. "You two might just want to stay outside the restroom." Bart then asks Maggie. "Why are you embarrassed Maggie?" Maggie says. "No I'm not embarrassed! I'm just pooping on the toilet and don't think that you and chief Wiggum will be able to breathe if you two come in here."

Bart and chief say. "Ok Maggie we'll let you finish pooping, but chief Wiggum was telling me how it's hit or miss with Ralph's potty training." When all of a sudden Ralph shows up. Does Ralph need to use the potty?
